title: OPERATION REBUILD HOPE VETERAN TRANSITIONAL HOUSING - 211info
text: TIMBERWOLVES DEN OPERATION REBUILD HOPE VETERAN TRANSITIONAL HOUSING Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides transitional housing and wrap around services by offering clean, sober, and safe living facilities. 1480 Sherman Avenue North Bend, OR 97459 Eligibility: Must be eligible for Veterans Affairs Grant Per Diem (VA-GPD) and pass a criminal background check (no violent criminal history). Hours: Monday-Friday 10am-3pm Email (541) 808-9025 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 808-9025 Administration (541) 808-3266 Main phone Bryan's Home Peer Support Desk Administration (541) 808-9025 Main Phone (541) 808-3266 Bryan's Home Peer Support Desk Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, call, email, or visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Completed application AREA SERVED: Coos and Curry Counties Services: Case/Care Management * Veterans Peer Mental Health Support Services * Veterans Transitional Housing/Shelter * Homeless Veterans If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. TIMBERWOLVES DEN
